# Artagers Grigoryan — Product Designer

> Creative Product Designer with 3+ years of experience crafting user-centred digital products across gaming, fintech, and mobility sectors. Proven ability to translate complex requirements into intuitive interfaces — from UX research and wireframing through to high-fidelity prototypes and shipped product. Experienced founder, mentor, and cross-functional collaborator.

## Contact

- Website: https://artagers.design
- Email: artagersgrigoryan@gmail.com
- Phone: +374 98 718 748
- Location: Yerevan, Armenia

## Skills

User Research, Information Architecture, Interaction Design, Visual Design, Prototyping, UI Design, Accessibility, Communication, Problem-Solving, Design Thinking

## Tools

Figma, Webflow, Tilda, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Premiere Pro, Adobe After Effects

## Languages

- Armenian: Native
- Russian: Fluent
- English: Conversational

## Experience

### Product Designer — UXCentury
April 2025 – March 2026

- Designed end-to-end UX for online casino and custom game platforms — from concept ideation to polished, launch-ready interfaces.
- Transformed complex betting data and intricate logic into clean, high-performance dashboards used by thousands of players.
- Delivered seamless interactive gaming experiences built specifically for the Telegram ecosystem.

### UX / UI Designer — Freelance
2022 – Present

- Designed user interfaces for blockchain-based gaming and lottery platforms, measurably improving engagement metrics.
- Integrated Telegram bot flows to streamline user onboarding and in-app interaction.
- Delivered visually compelling casino game interfaces that contributed to successful product launches.

### Founder & Head of Product — OneRide
2024 – 2025

- Founded and led the design and launch of OneRide, a carsharing taxi service connecting Yerevan to regional destinations.
- Oversaw all business functions — product design, marketing, operations — while scaling service coverage across multiple routes.
- Grew a high-performing team and drove consistent user acquisition, establishing OneRide as a trusted regional transport option.

### UX / UI Mentor — EIF (Enterprise Incubator Foundation)
May 2024 – September 2024

- Mentored cohorts of students in UX/UI principles, web design, and Figma, guiding them to build strong portfolios.
- Helped mentees land freelance work on Upwork and Fiverr by coaching CV writing and professional positioning.

### UX / UI Designer — TechMind
2022 – 2024

- Conducted user research and usability testing to validate design decisions and surface actionable insights.
- Produced wireframes and interactive prototypes that clearly communicated design concepts to stakeholders.
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to ship responsive, accessible websites on time.

### Co-Founder & UX / UI Designer — UnityX
2022 – 2023

- Co-founded a design studio delivering mobile app and website designs for clients across multiple industries.
- Built client relationships and delivered tailored design solutions aligned with business goals.

## Education

- **UX / UI Level Up** — Pixel IT School, 2022–2023
- **Graphic Design** — Vanadzor Technology Center, 2022–2023
- **Fine Arts** — Tavrizyan Art College, 2018–2023
- **UX / UI Design** — Self-taught, 2022–Present

## About This Site

This portfolio showcases selected case studies in UX/UI design across gaming, fintech, and mobility. It includes detailed breakdowns of design process, research, wireframing, prototyping, and final UI across each project. The site also features a full work history, contact form, and direct links to reach Artagers.

## Availability

Open to new projects, collaborations, and full-time positions. Response time: within 24 hours.
